title: Create a Checkout Session
excerpt: Settings for price localization with [Adaptive Pricing](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/adaptive-pricing.md). - `adaptive_pricing.enabled` (boolean, optional) If set to `true`, Adaptive Pricing is available on [eligible sessions](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/currencies/localize-prices/adaptive-pricing.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted#restrictions). Defaults to your [dashboard setting](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/adaptive-pricing). Configure actions after a Checkout Session has expired. You can’t set this parameter if `ui_mode` is `elements`. - `after_expiration.recovery` (object, optional) Configure a Checkout Session that can be used to recover an expired session.
